public_surface: No new Lisp function. Stable error codes remain internal machine identities; the REPL renders their profile-selected text.

delivery.reason: The existing reusable runtime-overlay library already maps stable resident error codes to plain text without consuming resident or L65S catalog capacity.

required_gates: all linked user-reachable error codes have Workbench text
not-built paths are absent from the Workbench profile
unknown or omitted codes fall back to the stable Ehh channel
the generated table is build-ID and CRC bound
resident, shelf, symbol, Namepool and Directory deltas are all zero
claim_limit: This receipt closes the Wave-2 delivery item by proving the already shipped L65E architecture. It adds no public condition system, user handler, dynamic payload, or error lookup primitive.
